core.label: Hy Fundamentals
core.description: A Lisp dialect embedded in Python.

topics.label: Installation
topics.description: pip install hy. Write Lisp that compiles to Python AST.

topics.label: S-expressions in Python
topics.description: (print "hello") compiles to print("hello"). Full Python interop.

topics.label: Macros
topics.description: defmacro for compile-time code generation. Real Lisp macros on Python.

topics.label: Python Interop
topics.description: Import any Python module, use Python objects. Hy is Python with Lisp syntax.

topics.label: Functional Style
topics.description: map, filter, reduce, threading macros (->), and immutable-first style.

topics.label: REPL & Jupyter
topics.description: Interactive development with hy REPL and Jupyter/Calysto kernels.
